questionHtml: With reference to the shape of the graph, explain whether your answer to part (a)(i) will be an over-estimate or an underestimate of the area.
markschemeHtml:
The graph is concave up,         R1

so the trapezoidal rule will give an overestimate.         A1

[2 marks]

meta.title: With reference to the shape of the graph, explain whether your answer to part (a)(i) will be an over-estimate or an underestimate of the area.
